tips_en: Start with LocateAnything, as its parallel decoding breakthrough offers the broadest immediate impact on vision-language grounding speed and directly supports GUI agent perception. MobileGym then shows how lightweight simulation enables scalable training of such agents, while TriSplat provides the simulation-ready 3D meshes needed for embodied environments—together forming a pipeline from efficient 2D perception to interactive simulation.
tips_zh: 建议先阅读 LocateAnything，其并行解码突破对视觉语言定位速度具有最广泛的直接影响，并直接支持 GUI 智能体感知。MobileGym 展示了轻量级模拟如何支持此类智能体的可扩展训练，而 TriSplat 提供了具身环境所需的仿真就绪 3D 网格——三者共同构成了从高效 2D 感知到交互式仿真的完整链路。
